result.summary: windows.net resolves to Microsoft Fabric developer surfaces: REST API, GraphQL API, and an MCP-related doc page; auth appears to use Microsoft Entra ID OAuth bearer tokens.

entra_oauth.label: Microsoft Entra ID OAuth access token
entra_oauth.setup: Create or use a Microsoft Entra ID app registration in the tenant that has access to the Fabric workspace. The easiest path is to register an app in the [Azure portal / Entra](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/identity-platform/quickstart-register-app), grant the Microsoft Fabric / Power BI permissions required by the API, and obtain an OAuth access token for that app or signed-in user. Use the token as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
